title: Tom's Tech Storage
description: Resource pack for Tom's Simple Storage to give it a technology theme.
body:
![Orange (Default) Theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb549d908f5776b2ba7093a9b16bb814009545f_0.webp)

Tom's Tech Storage is a tech themed resource pack for [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage).

The pack includes various color themes you can chose from. Changing themes or turning off animations require [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts).

The GUI interfaces have been customized as well. They pair well with [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) + [Whimscape Better Containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-better-containers-gui).

(screenshots are with the [Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) enabled)

Shoutout to [tom5454](https://modrinth.com/user/tom5454) for this awesome mod :D 

Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) and [Mine_mee](https://modrinth.com/user/Mine_mee) for the Whimscape inspirations for the GUIs embdedded here.
